title: Midjourney launches an AI-powered ultrasound body scanner
summary: The generative imaging company presents a medical device that scans the body in one minute without radiation.

title: Tim Cook confirms that AI and memory shortage will cause iPhone price increases
summary: Apple's CEO attributes future cost increases to the impact of artificial intelligence and the chip crisis.

title: Adobe integrates AI assistants into its creative applications
summary: Premiere, Illustrator, InDesign and Photoshop now incorporate AI functionalities to facilitate creative work.

title: Google releases Android 17 for Pixel with improved multitasking and gaming mode
summary: The new version of the operating system includes advanced features and GrapheneOS is already available for it.

title: Mastodon updates its platform with collections and bets on newsletters to grow
summary: The decentralized social network adds redesigned profiles and explores newsletters to revitalize the open social web.

title: FortiBleed campaign compromises credentials of more than 73,000 Fortinet devices
summary: Attackers accessed data from Fortinet firewalls used by large global companies.

title: Amazon, Nvidia, and AMD invest $310 million in 3D model startup Odyssey
summary: The world model company reaches a valuation of $1.45 billion with support from tech giants.

title: G7 debates AI access after US restrictions on Anthropic models
summary: World leaders want American technology but without the US being able to control its use.

title: GTA 6 reveals its official cover art and sets pre-order date for June 25
summary: Rockstar Games unveils the cover of the highly anticipated game and announces the start of pre-orders.

title: Waymo pulls 4,000 robotaxis to prevent them from driving through highway construction zones
summary: The recall aims to update navigation software to avoid accidents in construction areas.

title: ChatGPT market share falls below 50% for the first time in May 2026
summary: Gemini exceeds 25% and Claude reaches 10%, intensifying competition in the AI assistant market.

title: SpaceX buys Cursor creator Anysphere for $60 billion
summary: Elon Musk's company acquires the AI tool startup for developers.

title: NASA selects Eric Schmidt's rocket company for Mars mission
summary: The company will compete with SpaceX in the race to send missions to the Red Planet.

title: Epic Games prepares support for its Easy Anti-Cheat on Linux
summary: Compatibility would allow running Fortnite and Rocket League on Steam Deck and Linux distributions.

title: Yann LeCun predicts a 'bubble burst' in AI labs like OpenAI and Anthropic
summary: Meta's chief AI scientist warns of an imminent correction in the artificial intelligence sector.

title: Former Google Gemini co-leader Noam Shazeer joins OpenAI
summary: The researcher returns to the company he helped found after two years at Google, in a key move for the industry.

title: Threads reaches 500 million users, but revenue figures remain unknown
summary: Meta's social network is growing in users although its monetization is still uncertain.

title: Snap sinks in the stock market after unveiling very expensive augmented reality glasses
summary: The launch of high-cost AR glasses fails to convince investors, causing a sharp drop in shares.

title: Microsoft researcher creates a neural network with goats in Age of Empires II to critique AI
summary: The peculiar experiment uses the video game as a metaphor to question the robustness of artificial intelligence research.

title: Operating humanoid robots with the body becomes a trendy job in China
summary: The demand for human operators to control robots in Chinese industry is booming.
